extortion.description: D.A. Whitacre Construction, Inc. is a San Diego-based commercial construction firm with nearly 40 years of experience. The company specializes in framing and has worked on notable projects such as the US Fish Wildlife HQ, SeaWorld attractions, and various educational and hospitality facilities. Their clients include prominent institutions like San Diego State University and Hotel Del Coronado, highlighting their expertise in both commercial and large-scale construction projects. D.A. Whitacre is committed to quality construction services in the residential and commercial markets.
